recommendations: ADAPTIVE TOKEN BUDGETS: Detect model context capacity (Opus 4.6 = 1M tokens) and scale token budgets accordingly. Current fixed 2500-token budget is conservative for large-context models.

OBSERVATION MASKING: Per JetBrains NeurIPS 2025 research, mask large observation payloads (stack traces, code blocks) rather than truncating the reasoning chain. Current compact tier truncates uniformly.
KV-CACHE STABILITY: Ensure skill auto-injection uses a stable prefix without dynamic timestamps. Per Manus research, this can achieve 10x cost reduction on cached prefixes.
